Plan: 4 to modify, 1 to drop.

Summary by type:
  tables: 1 to modify
  views: 2 to modify, 1 to drop
  materialized views: 1 to modify

Tables:
  ~ foo
    - drop_me (column)

Views:
  ~ foo_v
  ~ foo_v2
    + trg_keep (trigger)
  - old_consumer

Materialized views:
  ~ foo_mv
    + foo_mv (comment)

DDL to be executed:
--------------------------------------------------

DROP VIEW IF EXISTS old_consumer RESTRICT;

DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS foo_mv RESTRICT;

DROP VIEW IF EXISTS foo_v2 RESTRICT;

DROP VIEW IF EXISTS foo_v RESTRICT;

ALTER TABLE foo DROP COLUMN drop_me;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW foo_v AS
 SELECT id,
    keep_me
   FROM foo;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW foo_v2 AS
 SELECT id,
    keep_me
   FROM foo_v;

CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER trg_keep
    INSTEAD OF INSERT ON foo_v2
    FOR EACH ROW
    EXECUTE FUNCTION foo_v2_noop();

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS foo_mv AS
 SELECT id,
    keep_me
   FROM foo_v2;

COMMENT ON MATERIALIZED VIEW foo_mv IS 'snapshot over foo_v2';
